name: Scanned - ISO Code Bank Instructions
prompt:
This is a SCANNED SSI document (image-based PDF). It contains a table of settlement instructions organized by ISO currency code. The entity name and address typically appear at the top right of the page.

The main table has columns for ISO code, intermediary bank details, and beneficiary bank details with their SWIFT codes and account numbers.

Carefully extract the entity information from the header area and every row from the settlement table. Preserve all SWIFT/BIC codes and account numbers exactly.

sections.name: entity_info
sections.description: Entity name and address from the top of the page

sections.name: settlement_instructions
sections.description: Table of settlement instructions per ISO currency code
